meta.title: Red Flag Green Flag Test - What Flag Are You? | DopaBrain
meta.description: 15 scenario-based questions to reveal your red flag and green flag ratio! Dating, friendships, and workplace — what flag are you?
meta.og_title: Red Flag Green Flag Test - What Flag Are You? | DopaBrain
meta.og_description: 15 scenarios to discover your red flag vs green flag ratio in relationships!
meta.twitter_title: Red Flag Green Flag Test | DopaBrain
meta.twitter_description: 15 scenarios to reveal your flag ratio!

app.title: Red Flag Green Flag Test
app.subtitle: Are you a walking green flag?

q1.text: Your partner checks your phone without asking. You...
q1.c: Check their phone back for revenge

q2.text: A friend constantly cancels plans. You...
q2.a: Talk openly about how it affects you
q2.c: Cancel on them next time for payback
q2.d: Always say it's fine even though it hurts

q3.text: Your colleague takes credit for your work. You...
q3.a: Address it professionally in a meeting
q3.b: Complain to other coworkers about it
q3.c: Take credit for their work next time
q3.d: Let it go and do nothing

q4.text: Someone you're dating doesn't text back for 3 days. You...
q4.c: Post something to make them jealous

q5.text: Your friend gossips about others to you. You...
q5.a: Change the subject or express discomfort
q5.d: Assume they gossip about you too but stay silent

q6.text: Your partner gets jealous when you hang out with friends. You...
q6.a: Have an honest conversation about trust
q6.b: Limit your time with friends to avoid conflict
q6.c: Make them more jealous on purpose
q6.d: Think jealousy means they love you more

q7.text: A coworker always interrupts you in meetings. You...
q7.a: Politely but firmly say "I'd like to finish my point"

q8.text: Your date is rude to the waiter. You...
q8.a: Recognize it as a red flag and reconsider

q9.text: Someone gives you the silent treatment after a fight. You...
q9.a: Give them space then initiate a calm talk
q9.c: Give them the silent treatment back

q10.text: Your friend borrows money and never pays back. You...
q10.a: Kindly remind them about the loan
q10.b: Never lend them money again but don't mention it
q10.d: Keep lending because you can't say no

q11.text: Your partner dismisses your feelings as 'overreacting'. You...
q11.a: Explain why your feelings are valid calmly
q11.d: Agree and apologize for being sensitive

q12.text: A friend shares your secrets with others. You...
q12.a: Tell them that broke your trust and set a boundary
q12.d: Pretend you don't know they did it

q13.text: Your date only talks about themselves. You...
q13.a: Try to steer the conversation, then decide if it's a pattern
q13.d: Think they're just passionate and it's fine

q14.text: Someone apologizes but keeps doing the same thing. You...
q14.a: Set a clear boundary with consequences
q14.b: Accept the apology every time hoping they'll change
q14.c: Stop accepting apologies and hold grudges
q14.d: Think maybe you're being too harsh

q15.text: Your partner supports your goals and celebrates your wins. You...
q15.a: Express gratitude and support them equally
q15.b: Feel great but forget to reciprocate
q15.d: Think you don't deserve the support

greenHigh.title: The Walking Green Flag
greenHigh.desc: You're everyone's dream! Healthy boundaries, great communication, and emotional maturity. You bring stability and safety to every relationship.

greenMed.title: The Relationship Role Model
greenMed.desc: You make healthy choices in most situations! You might waver sometimes, but overall your relationship patterns are impressive.

yellowHigh.title: The Work in Progress
yellowHigh.desc: Self-aware and actively growing! You're not perfect yet, but you're heading in the right direction. Keep going!

yellowMed.title: The Diamond in the Rough
yellowMed.desc: Full of potential! You sometimes avoid conflict or ignore your own needs, but you know what the right path looks like.

redHigh.title: The Loveable Red Flag
redHigh.desc: Charming but chaotic! You tend to let emotions lead the way, but that's also part of your irresistible appeal.

redMed.title: The Passionate Tornado
redMed.desc: Emotional and impulsive at times! Your passion runs deep, but sometimes that energy flows in the wrong direction.

mixed.title: The Complex Character
mixed.desc: Unpredictable and multi-layered! You show completely different sides depending on the situation. A fascinating personality.

balanced.title: The Beautiful Contradiction
balanced.desc: All flags in perfect balance! You're not perfect, but accepting all sides of yourself is where growth begins.

result.title: Your Flag Report
result.percentileStat: Only {percent}% of participants share your flag profile
